content.en:
Ye Tian's physical body transformed again, and his strength was increased to a two-star peak god general, even if he was suppressed in the Ancient Demon Tower, it was a fact that the strength of his physical body had increased, so the strength he exerted in the Ancient Demon Tower had naturally increased a lot.

So, Ye Tian continued to break through the Ancient Demon Tower and came to the fifth layer.

The fifth-layer ancient demons are comparable to the three-star god generals in terms of physical strength, and even much stronger than the average three-star god generals, plus the combination of ten ancient demons is enough to make any three-star god general desperate, and only the three-star god general with a physical body against the sky can be expected to pass.

But Ye Tian entered the fifth layer, and with his incomparably superb combat skills and anti-heaven combat experience, he fought with the fifth-layer ancient demons for a long time.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

Ye Tian fought frantically, the whole person was like the most sophisticated machine, there was no mistake at all, and he continued to learn the ancient demon's combat skills, and gradually found out the loopholes in the cooperation between them.

Five days passed, and Ye Tian followed the loophole and finally killed one of the ancient demons, and then killed the other ancient demons one by one.

When all the ancient demons died, Ye Tian's physical strength was almost exhausted.

"Finally made it through the fifth floor!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief and said.

After breaking through the fifth layer, more Ancient Demon Essence Essence Elements descended, Ye Tian seized the time to absorb Ancient Demon Essence Essence and cultivate the Xuan Xuan Technique.

It's a pity that the Xuanxuan Jue has reached the third layer of perfection, and it is very difficult to break through to the fourth layer, which is not something that these ancient demon essences can do.

Therefore, after absorbing these ancient demon essences, Ye Tian's physical strength had only increased a little, but it was far from reaching the level of transformation.

"The sixth layer can only give up!"

Ye Tian decided.

He could only barely break through the fifth layer, and the sixth layer was bound to be more difficult, unless he could step into the three-star god general, and his physical body would be transformed, there would be hope.

Otherwise, he wouldn't want to go to the sixth layer to find abuse.

Immediately, Ye Tian gave up going to the sixth layer.

Just as Ye Tian announced to the machine spirit that he had given up breaking through the sixth layer, the machine spirit asked, "Someone who has passed through, have you announced your clearance record?"

"No!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

He didn't dare to announce the record of the level, you must know that the other gods would only pass the third layer at most, and if he broke through the fifth layer, it would be so scary!

And he didn't want to be targeted.

In case other gods encircle him, even if he can escape, there will be a lot of trouble, and the human race will become the focus of the Cangyu universe.

So, he's better go into hiding.

The water in the Dual Universe Era is very deep, and who knows if there are other arrangements for the Tibetan God Organization?

Moreover, Ye Tian had another concern.

That is, whether there are other forces involved.

The Tibetan God Organization is only a small force in the chaos, other forces may have discovered the dual universe plan, at least those powers that have left a legacy in the dual universe must be aware of it, and some powers don't care, it doesn't mean that other powers don't care.

The Tibetan God Organization may be able to stop some of the weaker Chaos powerhouses, but the powerhouses of the Great Dao Realm, they can't stop them.

The Dual Universe Project is taboo in the chaos, and even if other big forces know about it, they may not participate openly, but it is possible to participate secretly and send in some powerful geniuses.

So, don't expose your strength and hole cards as early as possible.

Ye Tian knew very well that his strength was only a two-star peak god general, and he was completely an ant in the chaos, and he hadn't even reached the qualifications to become a powerful official disciple, how could he dare to be arrogant!

Wow!

Ye Tian was moved out by the machine spirit, and the real results were naturally hidden, no one knew that Ye Tian had broken through the fifth layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, otherwise it would definitely cause the shock of countless powerhouses in the universe.

After coming out of the Ancient Demon Cave, Ye Tian silently returned to the Ancient Universe and returned to the Terran Territory.

But not long after I came back, the universe changed dramatically!

......

Bang!!!!!

The Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe underwent amazing changes at the same time, the void was elongating and expanding, the entire universe began to expand, and it expanded at an astonishing speed, and a large number of creatures appeared everywhere in the universe.

Moreover, the space in the universe is shattered, the rules are broken, and even worlds appear and merge into the starry sky of the universe.

Ordinary people still thought that the world was over, but the powerhouses above the Earth Venerable knew what was happening.

Terran, Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian looked at the changes in the universe and muttered, "The dimensional world is about to merge into the main world!"

The universe is composed of a large number of dimensional worlds, the area where all races live is equivalent to the main world, and the other worlds are dimensional worlds, each dimensional world has special rules, and there are even many dimensional worlds that do not even have creatures at all, only endless space storms. It can be said that only one percent of the world has living beings.

In addition, some of the dimensional worlds closest to the main world have no creatures, only the power of space, which is also the reason why the powerhouses of the main world have torn apart the void and have never seen creatures in the dimensional world being affected.

Now, the fusion of the two universes has caused the transformation of the two universes, and some dimensional worlds have also begun to integrate into the main world, and with the integration of the dimensional world, the area of the main world has begun to increase, which is equivalent to the universe has begun to grow.

In addition, the rules of the Overworld have changed.

In the beginning, the Overworld suppressed the body and soul, and only the divine power prevailed.

But now, the restrictions of the body and soul have begun to loosen, and once you integrate into the dimensional world, the more rules and restrictions will be fewer.

In the Heavenly Pavilion, a disciple above the rank of a god was laughing.

"Hahaha, I can cultivate that body refining secret technique, my physical body has actually undergone a transformation!"

"Isn't the physical body above the god level fixed, my physical body is slowly improving, oh my God!"

"Haha, I'm able to improve my physical body, am I going to rise?"

......

Not only the Heavenly Pavilion, but also the entire human race, the entire universe, countless powerhouses above the god level were crazy and happy, and even the Earth Venerables were very excited.

Although the Earth Venerables can also slowly increase the strength of their physical bodies, the speed is too slow, and now they are increasing the strength of their physical bodies much faster.

Originally, some of the Earth Zun who were in the third or fourth star and could not progress for hundreds of millions of years can now easily break the shackles.

It is conceivable that the seven- and eight-star Earth Venerables in the universe will no longer be rare, and even the Ten Star Earth Venerables will appear in large numbers.

Of course, it is still difficult for a god-level powerhouse to appear, and only a true genius can step into the god-level combat power.

In the 100 years that the dimensional world has been integrated into the main world, only some superficial dimensional worlds have been integrated, but over time, the deep dimensional world has also begun to crumble and merge into the main world.

As a result, some powerful creatures began to appear, including some earth-level creatures, as well as some special dimensional world races.

Suddenly, the situation in the entire universe became more complicated.
